About this item

  • HDMI A MALE TO A MALE CABLE: Supports Ethernet, 3D, 4K video and Audio Return Channel (ARC)
  • COMPATIBILITY: Connects Blu-ray players, Fire TV, Apple TV, PS4, PS3, XBox One, Xbox 360, computers, and other HDMI-enabled devices to TVs, displays, A/V receivers, and more
  • EASY CONNECTION: Cable allows you to share an Internet connection among multiple devices without the need for a separate Ethernet cable
  • 4K VIDEO: Meets HDMI standards (4K Video at 60 Hz, 2160p, 48 bit/px color depth) that supports bandwidth up to 18Gbps and backwards compatible with earlier versions.
  • DIMENSIONS: 6 feet (1.8 meters)

Product guides and documents

User guide (PDF)

From the manufacturer

AmazonBasics High-Speed HDMI Cable, 6 Feet, 1-Pack

AmazonBasics High-Speed HDMI Cable

Enjoy clear, crisp, immediate connectivity with the AmazonBasics High-Speed HDMI Cable. This quality High-Definition Multimedia Interface (HDMI) cable allows you to connect a wide variety of devices in the realms of home entertainment, computing, gaming, and more to your HDTV, projector, or monitor. Perfect for those that interact with multiple platforms and devices, you can rely on strong performance and playback delivery when it comes to your digital experience.

  • Male-to-male HDMI cord for digital devices
  • High-speed connectivity provides excellent playback and performance
  • Durably built with 26AWG
  • Connect gaming systems, media players and more to your HDTV, projector, or monitor
  • CL3 rated for in-wall installation

High Speed Endurance & Compatibility

Bridging the gap between audio and video in one dynamic cable, you can connect your Blu-ray player, computer, AV receiver, Apple TV, Roku, cable box, Play Station 3, Play Station, Xbox One, 360, Nintendo Wii, Wii U or other HDMI compatible devices to your Ultra 4K TV (UHD TV), HDTV, monitor, or projector. The AmazonBasics HDMI cable displays 4K video at 24 Hz, 1080p at 60 Hz, with 48-bit deep color, and supports bandwidth of 10.2 Gbps.

Durable Construction

Built to last, the male-to-male AmazonBasics High-Speed HDMI Cable features 26AWG pure copper conductors, triple-shielding and gold-plated full metal jacket connectors that prevent interference and boost performance. CL3-rated for in-wall installation.

AmazonBasics High-Speed 4K HDMI Cable
nonda USB C to HDMI Cable

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzes reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Sponsored

Customers say

The electronic cable works perfectly fine and offers great quality construction. Customers find it seems very robust and solid, with a great length that is probably long enough for most needs. The picture quality is quite good, and both picture and sound are good. Users appreciate the ease of use, though they have different opinions on signal quality and thickness.

The electronic cable works perfectly fine according to customers who have used it.

763 customers mention quality, 712 positive, 51 negative763 customers mention "Quality"712 positive51 negative
Customers appreciate the quality of this electronic cable. They describe it as a great quality cable and a very good cord. The HDMI cable receives positive feedback from users who consider it a good product.
"Good quality and fast connection, I would have given 5 stars if the plastic ends would be smaller to fit easier in narrow spaces (like a PVC ducting)" Read more
"Great product, the 10 ft cord was needed to be placed in between the walls to be hidden as the standard 7 feet cords were too short" Read more
"good product. though I used only to connect my laptop to my monitor for bigger display." Read more
"This is a good cable, I am not sure if its the cable or my surround sound, but there is a half second delay in sound when you hit play...." Read more
115 customers mention durability, 88 positive, 27 negative115 customers mention "Durability"88 positive27 negative
Customers find the electronic cable to be very robust and solid. The cable features a sturdy rubber skin and appears well-built. Users report that it lasts and maintains steady performance over time.
"...This cable is quite thick and feels well-shielded and durable. Impressive for how inexpensive it is...." Read more
"its an hdmi 2.0 cable and works perfectly, cable looks and feel sturdy. cheapest on amazon prime cable too...." Read more
"Although the cable looks very thick, well made and heavy duty, the one I received was faulty and does not work." Read more
"Too heavy duty for ordinary applications, broke my HDMI port" Read more
96 customers mention length, 84 positive, 12 negative96 customers mention "Length"84 positive12 negative
Customers appreciate the cable's length, finding it suitable for their needs. They describe it as having great length that is probably long enough, with some noting that a long line is better than a short one. The cable provides perfect length to reach from devices like TVs, and customers value being able to pick the exact length they want, with the cable measuring exactly 6 feet.
"...good picture quality, no delay, good length, nice quality for what you pay for." Read more
"...No issues what so ever over the last year of constant use all day. Great length and quality, double so when you consider the price point...." Read more
"Perfect length, excellent price - best value for your buck!" Read more
"Delivery was swift. It does what it is supposed to. Easy to use and long lasting" Read more
93 customers mention picture quality, 76 positive, 17 negative93 customers mention "Picture quality"76 positive17 negative
Customers find the picture quality quite good with good resolution. The picture and sound work fine, though some note there is not a major difference in picture quality.
"Got this for my second Nintendo Switch dock and it's perfect. good picture quality, no delay, good length, nice quality for what you pay for." Read more
"Fit and feel was great with great picture and soung" Read more
"...The picture quality instantly improved—sharp, clear, no weird flickers or lag. What I love:..." Read more
"...and I've had no issues with connectivity, picture quality or cable quality so far...." Read more
56 customers mention ease of use, 46 positive, 10 negative56 customers mention "Ease of use"46 positive10 negative
Customers find the electronic cable straightforward to use. They describe it as real easy, simple to plug in, and easy to connect. The cable is easy to manipulate and sets up in seconds, making it convenient for users.
"Delivery was swift. It does what it is supposed to. Easy to use and long lasting" Read more
"Simple and efficient. Work as intended. Go for it." Read more
"Easy to install, great value for the money" Read more
"Easy to connect, good material" Read more
84 customers mention signal quality, 39 positive, 45 negative84 customers mention "Signal quality"39 positive45 negative
Customers have mixed experiences with the signal quality of this electronic cable. Some report that 4K works good and the cable can handle 4K 120Hz, with TV working at 4K 60Hz. However, others encounter issues, noting that HDR causes huge signal loss and the cable is unable to pass the full UHD 60Hz signal or support 4K 60fps.
"Didnt work. Had intermittent signal so used a different cable and the device worked fine. Could be just a one off lemon." Read more
"Haven’t had any issues. No flickering. Good quality picture. Good value for the price." Read more
"...about 2-4 months before they degrade enough to cause green tints, flickering and loss of audio/video signals...." Read more
"does what it is supposed to. Clean signal." Read more
60 customers mention thickness, 30 positive, 30 negative60 customers mention "Thickness"30 positive30 negative
Customers have mixed opinions about the cable's thickness. Some find it thicker than expected and describe it as a very thick, strong cord, while others consider it ridiculously thick. However, some note that shorter cables may be thinner.
"Works great. Nice and thick cable." Read more
"Works well for the price. My main complaint is the cable is very thick and not pliable, so it was hard to run in the wall and connect behind a wall..." Read more
"...These are a phenomenal HDMI cable, with the latest standard, the cable is super thick and the ends are gold plated...." Read more
"The cord works perfectly fine but it's very thick and not as flexible, would prefer a braided cord" Read more

  • Amazon Customer
    5 out of 5 stars
    Surprisingly impressed with this Amazon Basics branded 15ft. HDMI cable
    Reviewed in Canada on June 13, 2025
    Size: 15 Feet, 1-PackStyle: 1-Pack
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    As a computing professional, I was hesitant to purchase Amazon Basics branded equipment, but this 15 foot HDMI cable seems surprisingly good quality. The first task was uncoiling, which the cable performed shockingly well at by not retaining tightly-coiled memory; often I have warm cables with a heatgun while straightening them to get them to lay flat, but not this one! I like that the cable doesn't have an outer decorative braid, as I find those just gather dust, and smooth jackets are easier to clean. Used for connecting a second PC to a dual-input monitor, hence needed the extra length to reach. When measuring for a cable, keep in mind not only the horizontal distance but also the vertical distance from the floor, as that alone can easily require 2 x 3ft. = 6ft. of length. It also helps to fasten at least 1 small loop of cable behind the monitor and PC, so that the connector doesn't have to bear the weight of the cable.

    Read moreRead less

    4 out of 5 stars
    Solid but ordinary HDMI cable
    Reviewed in Canada on March 20, 2026
    Size: 10 Feet, 1-PackStyle: 1-Pack
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    This HDMI cable works as expected. The Amazon Basics High-Speed 4K HDMI Cable delivers clear 4K video and sound without issues.

    It is reliable and durable enough for everyday use, but there is nothing special about it—it is just a standard, ordinary cable that does its job.

    Overall, a good basic cable at a reasonable price, but nothing extraordinary.

  • Leesha
    5 out of 5 stars
    Why I’ll Never Overpay for HDMI Cables Again
    Reviewed in Canada on June 18, 2025
    Size: 15 Feet, 1-PackStyle: 1-Pack
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I used to think all HDMI cables were the same, until I dealt with flickers, blurry spots, and lag with my old one. Super frustrating. I grabbed this Amazon Basics HDMI cable, mostly because it was affordable, and it exceeded my expectations. The picture quality instantly improved—sharp, clear, no weird flickers or lag.

    What I love:

    -Crystal-clear picture: Streaming in 4K has never looked better.

    -Super reliable: No disconnections or weird adjustments needed.

    -Durable yet sleek: Feels sturdy without being bulky.

    What could be better:

    -A bit stiff: The cable is slightly stiff, which can make it a little tricky to maneuver in tight spaces.

    -Length options: I wish there were more choices, but that’s just me being picky.

    Overall, this cable does exactly what I needed, without breaking the bank. I won’t be overpaying for another HDMI cable again.

    Read moreRead less

    Compré este cable HDMI de 15 pies porque el televisor y la computadora aparentemente decidieron divorciarse y quedarse en extremos opuestos de la habitación.

    Lo conecté y funcionó a la primera, algo tan raro en tecnología que casi llamo a alguien para presumirlo. La imagen se ve excelente y la longitud es perfecta para esconder el cable y fingir que soy una persona organizada.

    Excelente producto. El cable hizo su trabajo tan bien que me quedé sin excusas para culparlo cuando algo no funciona.

  • Darshil
    5 out of 5 stars
    Reliable 4K Cable That Works Exactly as Expected
    Reviewed in the United States on May 6, 2026
    Size: 6 FeetStyle: 1-Pack
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    Sometimes the best products are the ones that simply do their job without any issues, and this Amazon Basics HDMI cable does exactly that.

    I used it to connect my TV with a gaming console and streaming device, and the performance has been excellent. It delivers clear 4K resolution at 60Hz with no signal drops, flickering, or connection issues. The picture quality is sharp, colors look great, and everything runs smoothly whether I’m gaming, streaming movies, or watching regular content.

    The 6-foot length is also very practical. It gives enough flexibility for most setups without creating unnecessary cable clutter behind the TV or desk.

    Build quality feels better than expected for a basic cable. The connectors fit securely, and the cable itself feels durable enough for regular use without feeling overly stiff.

    I also appreciate that it works seamlessly across multiple devices. I tested it with a TV, gaming console, and streaming device, and it handled everything without needing any troubleshooting.

    Overall, this is a simple, dependable HDMI cable that delivers exactly what it promises at a very reasonable price. If you need a reliable 4K cable, this is an easy 5-star choice.

Product Summary: Amazon Basics High-Speed HDMI Cable (18 Gbps, 4K/60Hz) - 6 Feet, Black

From Amazon Basics

4.6 out of 5 stars, 338,764 ratings

Customer reviews

100+ bought in past month

Price

One-time purchase: $9.36

Purchasing options

Other sellers

Other sellers

About this Item

  • HDMI A MALE TO A MALE CABLE: Supports Ethernet, 3D, 4K video and Audio Return Channel (ARC)
  • COMPATIBILITY: Connects Blu-ray players, Fire TV, Apple TV, PS4, PS3, XBox One, Xbox 360, computers, and other HDMI-enabled devices to TVs, displays, A/V receivers, and more
  • EASY CONNECTION: Cable allows you to share an Internet connection among multiple devices without the need for a separate Ethernet cable
  • 4K VIDEO: Meets HDMI standards (4K Video at 60 Hz, 2160p, 48 bit/px color depth) that supports bandwidth up to 18Gbps and backwards compatible with earlier versions.
  • DIMENSIONS: 6 feet (1.8 meters)
